title: Serentiy Project
description: The Serenity Project has a calm, polished ring to it that fits perfectly with your goal of smoother performance and stress‑free gameplay. It suggests balance: Minecraft as it’s meant to feel, without the clutter or chaos.
body:
🌿 The Serenity Project

The Serenity Project is a lightweight, vanilla‑friendly modpack designed to make Minecraft smoother, faster, and more enjoyable—without changing the core experience. It blends powerful performance optimizations with subtle quality‑of‑life improvements, keeping the game familiar while removing small frustrations.

⚡ Performance & Optimization
- Sodium, Lithium, Sodium Extra, Reese’s Sodium Options, ImmediatelyFast, BadOptimizations – cutting‑edge performance mods for higher FPS and smoother gameplay
- Entity Culling, Clumps, Model Gap Fix – reduce rendering lag and visual stutter
- Fabric API, Fabric Language Kotlin, Cloth Config API, YetAnotherConfigLib, MaLiLib, Text Placeholder API – stable foundations for mod compatibility and customization
- More Culling - Culling is when you don't render things that the player can't see, to improve performance
- Ferrite Core - This mod reduces the memory usage of Minecraft in a few different ways. 
- 
🛠️ Quality of Life Enhancements
- AppleSkin – clear hunger and saturation info
- Client Sort, Mouse Tweaks – faster, smarter inventory management
- Controlling, Searchables – easy keybind and menu 
- cubes without borders – seamless window switching
- More Chat History – never lose track of conversations
- Status Effect Timer - To display how long your potions/effects will last
- Show Durability - Shows Durability above the tool in numbers
- Better f3 - Well, it makes the f3 menu better
- 
🎨 Visual & Cosmetic Touches
- [EMF] Entity Model Features & [ETF] Entity Texture Features – enhanced entity visuals without breaking vanilla style
- Iris Shaders – shader support for stunning visuals
- Capes – simple cosmetic flair
- 
🌍 Extra Tools
-Chunky- pre renders chunks for faster loading
- Lightly - shows light levels and has 3 settings
- Essential Mod – multiplayer tools and social features also having a zoom mod built in
- Mod Menu – simple interface for managing mods
- Tweakeroo – advanced client tweaks for fine‑tuned control
- Xaero’s Minimap – lightweight, customizable map for Navigation
- Server Pinger Fixer - improves how servers in the multiplayer list are pinged, making for a much nicer experience in the menu
- Simple Discord RPC  - Simple Discord RPC is a simple and easy to use mod that allows you to display what you are doing in Minecraft on your Discord Status.
- Replay Mod - The ReplayMod allows you to record, replay and share your gaming experience.(but go into the config to turn off auto on if you don't want it recording every time you open a world/server)

✨ Why Serenity?
Because Minecraft should feel calm, polished, and frustration‑free. This pack keeps the vanilla spirit intact while giving you the performance, clarity, and ease‑of‑play you’ve always wanted.
